title: Mason's Decoration Stuff II
body:
Another mod in the same line as Mason's Armory as another addon for Mason Decor, this time, as ACTUAL DECOR, CAN YOU BELIEVE THAT??? No, me either. This mod addes a lot of blocks and decorative stuff you can use to decorate your lair, with torches, bone blocks, and a cool throne, and to help you, a cool engineer armor that can help you with building, by giving you boosts.

## FEATURES
- **Building Blocks**
> - Soul Jack O' Lantern (A soul variant of the Jack O' Lantern, when right clicked: it makes a funny noise and moves a bit)
> - Blighted Bone Block [And variants] (Decorational purposes)
> - Compact Blighted Bone Block [And variants] (Decorational purposes)
> - Chiseled Blighted Bone Block [And variants] (Decorational purposes)
> - Skull Torch/Lantern (Cool way to iluminate your lair)
> - Gears [Small/Medium/Giant] (Decorational purposes)
> - Obelisk (When right clicked with a diamond block, it activates, giving the neraby entities 6 extra hearts; can be deactivates with shift+right click, but will onli give a diamond in return)
> - Soul Siren (Shift+Right click with the Host's Microphone* to activate all Soul Sirens* in a 300 block radious; will deactivate automatically after a short period of time)
> - Throne (Decorational purposes)
- **Items**
> - Ancient Relic (Made to craft Spirit Engineer Armor)
- **Arsenal**
> - Spirit Engineer Armor (Makes you levitate while sneaking, negates fall damage, makes you mine faster but gives you weakness, because it is not meant for pvp)
> - Host's Microphone (Inspired by Alastor's Microphone, this thing can make you teleport on right click and activate all Soul Sirens* in a 300 block radious on shift + right click)
